description: Open '~/AstroImages/raw/uit_galaxy_sample.fits' in AstroImageJ. Locate the bright central core of the galaxy and draw a rectangular Region of Interest (ROI) around it (roughly 150x150 to 200x200 pixels). Duplicate this ROI into a new image window to isolate the core. Apply the 'Fire' Lookup Table (LUT) to map the intensity values to a thermal color scale. Generate a 3D Surface Plot of this cropped, thermal-colored image. Save the resulting 3D surface plot window as a PNG file to '~/AstroImages/processed/galaxy_core_surface.png'.
